message:
chore(deps): record chrono in codec's dev-dependency lock entry

Picks up the codec crate's new `chrono.workspace = true`
[dev-dependencies] entry added in the preceding commit
(`test(codec): factor arb_id / arb_optional_id, adopt chrono
DateTime<Utc> timestamps`). The lockfile hunk is a single
additive line inside the codec crate's dependencies block:

    [[package]]
    name = "codec"
    dependencies = [
      ...
      "byteorder",
    + "chrono",
      "config",
      ...
    ]

No other package versions change; no new crates are pulled in
(chrono was already a workspace dependency used by sibling crates,
so no transitive additions land here).
